text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is the biggest race at the end of
the year, gathering together the best of the
classic and senior athletes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the paddock, Maruzensky is approached by an
Umamusume who has, until now, avoided racing
against her before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She is fascinated by Maruzensky's past
performances and expresses her wish to run
against her again someday.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky takes her words to heart and goes
into the race with a strong desire to inspire others
to continue racing.
